findings.description: Section content is "なし" (2 characters), which is below the 50-character minimum. The source has no introductory text between the 使用方法 h2 heading and its first sub-section, so "なし" is factually correct, but it falls below the threshold.
findings.source_evidence: Source 使用方法 section has no body text before its sub-sections (KeyValueデータフォーマッタの使用方法, フィールドタイプ・フィールドコンバータ定義一覧, 同一キーで複数の値を取り扱う場合).

findings.description: The converter name "リテラル値" is missing from s8's hints. It is the first-column value in the field converter table and should be included per the hints completeness rule.
findings.source_evidence: Source table row: 「リテラル値 | Object <-> Object | 入力時: (なにもしない) 出力時: ...」
